active_answer: My Nawashi: https://www.etsy.com/shop/MyNawashi; De Giotto Rope: https://degiottorope.com/
active_question: Which suppliers are recommended for natural-fiber bondage rope?
edited_answer: My Nawashi is the owner-listed Etsy resource (https://www.etsy.com/shop/MyNawashi), but its shop page was not reliably inspectable. De Giotto Rope (https://degiottorope.com/) has an inspected catalog showing jute and hemp rope in multiple lengths and colors, spooled and ready-to-use options, care supplies and guidance, tutorials, and classes.
edited_question: Which natural-fiber rope suppliers are owner-recommended, and what additional catalog information was verifiable?
paraphrase_rationale: The original answer preserved both supplier links but did not distinguish their verified coverage. The replacement keeps both exact owner-recommended URLs, adds inspected De Giotto catalog context, and explicitly avoids inventing details for the unavailable Etsy page.

support_evidence:
The supplied directory recommends My Nawashi for natural-fiber bondage rope: https://www.etsy.com/shop/MyNawashi. The Etsy shop page was not reliably inspectable during this review, so the durable supported claim is limited to the owner-supplied resource name, category, and URL.

The supplied directory also recommends De Giotto Rope: https://degiottorope.com/. Its inspected site lists jute and hemp shibari rope in multiple lengths and colors, spooled options, ready-to-use products, rope-care supplies and guidance, tutorial references, and classes; availability, price, and shipping details are volatile.
